name: Indoor Navigation Sensor Setup
description: You are a UAV Integration Engineer retrofitting a drone for automated warehouse inventory scanning where GPS is unavailable. Based on the hardware specifications in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/integration_work_order.txt, configure the firmware parameters to enable the downward-facing LiDAR (Rangefinder) and Optical Flow sensor. The configuration must include the Rangefinder driver and ranges, the TELEM2 serial port protocol and baud rate, the Optical Flow driver, and the EKF3 settings to utilize Optical Flow for horizontal velocity and the Rangefinder for altitude. Exactly 8 parameters must be set for the SITL simulator.
